protocol.name: Raddy Radio-C BLE Response Protocol
protocol.encoding: Hex-encoded bytes over BLE GATT characteristic 0000FF14

framing.byte1: Length or sub-length depending on command group
framing.note: substring = hex chars [0:6] (3 bytes), substring2 = hex chars [0:2], substring3/str = hex chars [4:6], substring45 = hex chars [6:8]

responses.name: UI Button State
responses.description: Controls the enable/disable state and click behavior of three main UI buttons: Sub-Band (MODE), Step, and Play/Scan. Each byte is 00=disabled (gray) or 01=enabled (active color with touch/click handlers).

responses.name: Radio Info Row Visibility
responses.description: Controls visibility and flicker state of 5 radio info indicator rows (demodulation, bandwidth, SNR, RSSI, text9). Position byte selects which row, state byte controls hidden/visible/flicker.

responses.name: Frequency & Band Status (Main)
responses.description: Primary frequency status response. Contains band type, 4-byte frequency (little-endian), frequency unit, decimal point position, and signal scan state. This is the main tuning status update sent continuously.

fields.name: decimalPointInfo
fields.note: Low nibble = af (decimal digits after point), High nibble = ag (decimal digits before point)

fields.name: signalScanState
fields.note: Stored in this.cj. Special case: if band=WB and freq=000000ff, shows 'ALERT' with flicker

responses.name: Signal Strength (RSSI & SNR)
responses.description: Reports the current signal RSSI and SNR values as hex-encoded integers.

responses.name: SQ Dialog / Preset Row Selection
responses.description: Controls the SQ (squelch) dialog dismiss and preset row selection popup. When byte3=00, dismisses the SQ dialog. When byte3=01, shows SQ selection popup attached to the row indicated by byte4.

values.01: show SQ popup on target row

responses.name: Frequency Input Mode Status
responses.description: Response to frequency input mode. Similar to ab0901 but includes an input mode status byte. Mode 00=normal display, 01=frequency entry mode (shows 'Please enter' if freq=0), 02=input error.

fields.name: frequency
fields.note: 4 bytes little-endian, same format as ab0901

fields.name: decimalPointInfo
fields.note: Low nibble = decimal position after, High nibble = decimal position before

responses.name: Demodulation & Bandwidth Settings
responses.description: Reports current demodulation mode, filter settings, and step/bandwidth values. Contains demodulation type, two unknown setting bytes, and a 16-bit step value.

fields.name: unknown1
fields.note: Read but no visible UI update

fields.name: unknown2
fields.note: Converted to decimal, checked for 0 or 1 but no visible UI update

fields.name: unknown3
fields.note: Checked for 00 or 01 but no visible UI update

fields.name: unknown4
fields.note: hexToDec(byte8+byte7), read but no visible UI update

responses.name: Sleep Timer Status
responses.description: Reports sleep timer countdown value. If 0, shows sleep-off icon with no text. Otherwise shows sleep-on icon with remaining minutes.

responses.name: Alarm Clock Status
responses.description: Reports alarm clock settings including alarm type, hour, minute, and alarm state (off/set/ringing/snooze). Updates alarm icon and time display accordingly.

fields.name: hour
fields.note: Stored in this.I, displayed as 2-digit decimal

fields.name: minute
fields.note: Stored in this.J, displayed as 2-digit decimal

values.01: alarm set (ic_alarm_open or ic_alarm_tip depending on type)

responses.name: Device Mode / Source Select
responses.description: Reports the current device operating mode/input source. Switches between radio view, MP3/media view, and various source-specific layouts.

values.01: Bluetooth audio (show MP3 layout, BT play controls)
values.04: SD card / USB playback (show MP3 layout with track info)
values.06: PC / USB audio input (show MP3 layout with PC icon)
values.07: AUX input (show MP3 layout with AUX icon)

responses.name: Battery Level
responses.description: Reports battery level and charging status. Updates battery icon in both radio and MP3 views.

responses.name: Volume Level
responses.description: Reports the current audio volume level as a hex-encoded value.

responses.name: EQ Mode
responses.description: Reports current equalizer preset. Updates the EQ icon image.

responses.name: Language Setting
responses.description: Sets the app locale to match the device language setting.

responses.name: Device Online Status
responses.description: Reports current device online information. Logged but no UI update observed in decompiled code.
responses.note: Only logged: '蓝牙传输回当前设备在线信息' (BT returned current device online info)

responses.name: Playback Status
responses.description: Reports whether media is currently playing or paused. Updates the play/pause button icon.

responses.name: Preset Station Mode
responses.description: Reports the current preset/memory station mode and number. Controls visibility and flicker of the preset indicator.

responses.name: Loop/Repeat Mode
responses.description: Reports the current playback loop/repeat mode for MP3/SD card playback.

responses.name: Track Selection / Number Input
responses.description: Reports track selection mode and current track number for MP3/SD card playback.

responses.name: Playback Time & Track Index
responses.description: Reports current playback elapsed time in seconds and current track index. Time is displayed as MM:SS format.

fields.name: currentTrackIndex
fields.note: hexToDec(byte9+byte8), displayed when in normal mode

responses.name: Track Count & Current Track
responses.description: Reports the current track number and total track count for MP3/SD playback.

responses.name: Bluetooth Device Name (Multi-Packet)
responses.description: Multi-packet transfer of the connected Bluetooth device name string (GBK encoded). Uses packet sequencing (01-04) for reassembly. Final result shown in a tip overlay.

responses.name: Firmware Version (Multi-Packet)
responses.description: Multi-packet transfer of firmware version string (GBK encoded). Uses packet sequencing for reassembly. Shows version in a VersionDialog.

responses.name: Custom Label 1: Demodulation Title (Multi-Packet)
responses.description: Multi-packet string for custom label row 1 (demodulation title). GBK encoded. Only displayed when the outer index byte equals 1.

fields.name: rowIndex
fields.note: Must be 01 for this label to display

responses.name: Custom Label 2: Demodulation Value (Multi-Packet)
responses.description: Multi-packet string for custom label row 2 (demodulation value). GBK encoded. Only displayed when the outer index byte equals 2.

responses.name: Custom Label 3: Bandwidth Title (Multi-Packet)
responses.description: Multi-packet string for custom label row 3 (bandwidth title). Only displayed when outer index byte equals 3.

responses.name: Custom Label 4: Bandwidth Value (Multi-Packet)
responses.description: Multi-packet string for custom label row 4 (bandwidth/step value). Only displayed when outer index byte equals 4.

responses.name: Custom Label 5: SNR Title (Multi-Packet)
responses.description: Multi-packet string for custom label row 5 (SNR title). Only displayed when outer index byte equals 5.

responses.name: Custom Label 6: SNR Value (Multi-Packet)
responses.description: Multi-packet string for custom label row 6 (SNR value). Only displayed when outer index byte equals 6.

responses.name: Custom Label 7: RSSI Title (Multi-Packet)
responses.description: Multi-packet string for custom label row 7 (RSSI title). Only displayed when outer index byte equals 7.

responses.name: Custom Label 8: RSSI Value (Multi-Packet)
responses.description: Multi-packet string for custom label row 8 (RSSI value). Only displayed when outer index byte equals 8.

responses.name: Custom Label 9: Row 9 Text (Multi-Packet)
responses.description: Multi-packet string for custom label row 9. Only displayed when outer index byte equals 9.

responses.name: Custom Label 10: Row 10 Text (Multi-Packet)
responses.description: Multi-packet string for custom label row 10. Only displayed when outer index byte equals 10.

responses.name: Custom Label 11: Row 11 Text (Multi-Packet)
responses.description: Multi-packet string for custom label row 11. Only displayed when outer index byte equals 11.

responses.name: Custom Label 12: Row 12 Text (Multi-Packet)
responses.description: Multi-packet string for custom label row 12. Displayed unconditionally on final decode.

responses.name: Custom Label 13: Volume/SD Label (Multi-Packet)
responses.description: Multi-packet string for SD volume / text row 13. Displayed unconditionally.

responses.name: Custom Label 14: Track Name (Multi-Packet)
responses.description: Multi-packet string for track/song name (row 14). Displayed unconditionally. Log label: '歌曲名' (song name).

responses.name: Custom Label 15: Secondary Track Info (Multi-Packet)
responses.description: Multi-packet string for secondary track/song info (row 15). Displayed unconditionally. Log label: '歌曲名' (song name).

responses.name: Dynamic Button Label 1: MODE Button (Multi-Packet)
responses.description: Multi-packet string for the MODE button label. GBK encoded.

responses.name: Dynamic Button Label 2: STEP Button (Multi-Packet)
responses.description: Multi-packet string for the STEP button label. GBK encoded.

responses.name: Dynamic Button Label 3: SCAN/Play Button (Multi-Packet)
responses.description: Multi-packet string for the SCAN/Play button label. GBK encoded.

responses.name: Dynamic Button Label 4: SOS Button (Multi-Packet)
responses.description: Multi-packet string for the SOS button label. GBK encoded.

responses.name: Dynamic Button Label 5: FUNC Button (Multi-Packet)
responses.description: Multi-packet string for the FUNC button label. GBK encoded.

responses.name: Custom Label 16: REC Status (Multi-Packet)
responses.description: Multi-packet string for REC (recording) status label (row 16). Displayed unconditionally.

responses.name: Device Power Off Notification
responses.description: Exact 5-byte match. Indicates the device is powered off. Hides the tip container and shows 'Please turn on the device...' message.

responses.name: Radio Detail Row Visibility
responses.description: Controls visibility and flicker state of 16 radio detail text rows. Similar to ab031e but for individual text labels rather than indicator rows. Position values 1-16 map to various display elements.
uiElements: aV, s, aW, t, aX, o, aY, n, aZ, ba, bb, bc, R, D, bO, aF

responses.name: BLE Disconnect Command
responses.description: Instructs the app to disconnect from the BLE device. Only acts if currently connected (am==2).

responses.name: Frequency Range Info
responses.description: Reports frequency range or band configuration. Stores band info and a 16-bit frequency value but does not update visible UI. Log label: stored in aH.

responses.name: Band Type Bitmask
responses.description: Reports a 16-bit bitmask (two bytes, converted to binary, reversed) indicating which radio bands/features are enabled. Each bit position maps to a RateTypeInfo entry in the band selector list.

fields.name: bitmaskLow
fields.note: Converted to 8-bit binary string (padded to 8 bits)

fields.name: bitmaskHigh
fields.note: Converted to 8-bit binary string (padded to 8 bits)

derivedFields.name: bandEnableBits
derivedFields.description: String.reverse(bitmaskHigh + bitmaskLow) - 16-bit reversed string where each character is '0' or '1'. Position i maps to aJ.get(i).setBitType(bit)

responses.name: Hardware Version / Device ID
responses.description: Reports a device version or configuration identifier. Stores value and shows it in the VersionDialog.

fields.name: versionId
fields.note: Stored in this.aI, displayed in VersionDialog alongside firmware version

responses.name: Toast Message (Multi-Packet)
responses.description: Multi-packet string displayed as an Android Toast notification. GBK encoded. Used for device-originated messages/alerts.

responses.name: SQ Level / Max SQ
responses.description: Reports the current squelch level and maximum squelch value. Both stored as decimal strings.
responses.note: Values stored but minimal UI update (only checks aT.equals('0'))

responses.name: Unknown Status 0x1b
responses.description: Single-byte status response. The value is read and checked against '00' on the UI thread but no visible action is taken in the decompiled code.

responses.name: SOS/FUNC Button Flicker
responses.description: Controls the flicker animation state of the SOS and FUNC button labels.

multiPacketProtocol.description: Strings longer than one BLE packet use a multi-packet assembly protocol. The packet sequence byte indicates position.

sequenceValues.01: First packet - store payload in buffer
sequenceValues.03: Final packet (short string, single packet) - decode and display
sequenceValues.04: Final packet (after multi-packet) - append, then decode full buffer and display

multiPacketProtocol.encoding: GBK (Chinese character set, decoded via bytes2decString -> new String(bytes, 'GBK'))
